channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Oil prices surge after Israeli strike on Iran’s South Pars gasfield
item.description: There are fears that a period of elevated oil and gas prices could trigger a damaging wave of global inflation.

item.title: Top US spy accused of omitting Iran intel that contradicts Trump
item.description: Top US spy was accused of altering testimony on Iran, omitting details that contradict Trump’s threat claims.

item.title: Israel attacks Iran’s major gas field in new escalation
item.description: Israel has struck facilities belonging to the world's largest natural gas field in Iran, marking a sharp escalation.

item.title: US intel chief Gabbard says Iran was not rebuilding enrichment prior to war
item.description: Gabbard's testimony contradicts one of several justifications Trump has given for launching war with Iran.

item.title: Qatar says Iran missile attack sparks fire, causes damage at gas facility
item.description: Qatar's Foreign Ministry strongly condemns attack that caused "extensive damage" at the Ras Laffan complex.

item.title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
item.description: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

item.title: Who will answer for the Iranian schoolchildren killed in Minab?
item.description: An investigation finds the Minab school strike may have been deliberate. Who can hold the US accountable?

item.title: Iranian women’s football team return to Iran
item.description: The Iranian national women's football team has returned to Iran, including several players who withdrew asylum requests.

item.title: Gunshots disperse crowd during Persian New Year festivities in Tehran
item.description: A crowd celebrating Chaharshanbe Suri in Tehran were forced to flee after gunshots disrupted their event.

item.title: How Los Angeles’s Iranian diaspora is confronting the US war on Iran
item.description: Residents are divided between supporting and opposing the US and Israeli war against Iran, amid fears for loved ones.
